---
title: "Package"
---

Working notes on the R package API design and refactoring decisions. This chapter will be removed or reorganized once the refactor is merged.

## Naming Conventions

Public-facing functions use dot notation to mirror base R (e.g., `cor.test`, `cov`):

- `ece.cov` — equivariant covariance estimator (replaces `equiv.cov`)
- `ece.test` — hypothesis test for correlation

Internal helpers use snake_case.

## Refactor Checklist

- [ ] Rename `equiv.cov` → `ece.cov`; drop `return.norm`; always return `list(cov, roughness)`
- [ ] Extract `compute_equiv` → `ece_pair`
- [ ] Rename `var_corr_est` → `ece_avar`
- [ ] Update `ece.test` to accept matrix `X` only (drop `Y = NULL`)
- [ ] Clean up `utils.R` dispatch triple pattern (`_vec` / `_mat` / dispatch)
- [ ] Consolidate `scenario.R` (~30 numbered functions → parameterized)
- [ ] Write tests for untested functions in `utils.R` and `theory.R`
